## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Feature or architecture changed
- [ ] `docs/DEVELOPMENT_LOG.md` updated (required for feature/architecture changes)
- [ ] `docs/ARCHITEKTUR_KERN.md` updated (if architecture rules changed)
- [ ] `docs/ARCHITEKTUR_UMSETZUNGSPLAN.md` updated (if open architecture work changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] New shortcuts are registered centrally in `bw_libs/ui_contract/keybinding.py`
- [ ] New popups follow central policy in `bw_libs/ui_contract/popup.py`
- [ ] Feature work is grouped in dedicated commit(s)
- [ ] No auto-push required; push stays manual
- [ ] Guardrail checks/tests run and documented

## Validation

List commands/tests executed.
